title: Annual Impact Showcase 2025
description: Join us for a celebration of our year's achievements! Meet project teams, see live demos, network with partners, and discover new opportunities. Light refreshments served.

title: Entrepreneurship Bootcamp
description: Intensive 3-day workshop on business planning, pitch delivery, and fundraising strategies. Limited slots available!

title: Community Outreach Forum
description: Direct engagement with communities we serve. Share feedback, discuss project needs, and co-create solutions.

title: Spring Recruitment Drive 2025
description: Successful recruitment campaign attracting 150+ new member applications across all departments.
recap: Outstanding turnout! We welcomed passionate students eager to make an impact. Meet-and-greet sessions helped clarify roles and project involvement.

title: International Enactus Summit 2024
description: Enactus JOOUST presented its Green Farm Initiative to 50+ country representatives
recap: Honored to represent East Africa! Won recognition for sustainability impact.

title: Women in Entrepreneurship Panel
description: International Women's Day celebration featuring female entrepreneurs and leaders
recap: Inspiring conversations about breaking barriers and building legacy businesses.
